title: AI Dev Engineer
company_focus:
Global data and technology company providing credit,
analytics, and fraud prevention services
description:
Company Description

Experian is a global data and technology company, powering
opportunities for people and businesses around the world. We
help to redefine lending practices, uncover and prevent
fraud, simplify healthcare, create marketing solutions, and
gain deeper insights into the automotive market, all using
our unique combination of data, analytics and software. We
also assist millions of people to realize their financial
goals and help them save time and money.

We operate across a range of markets, from financial
services to healthcare, automotive, agribusiness, insurance,
and many more industry segments.

We invest in people and new advanced technologies to unlock
the power of data. As a FTSE 100 Index company listed on the
London Stock Exchange (EXPN), we have a team of 22,500
people across 32 countries. Our corporate headquarters are
in Dublin, Ireland. Learn more at experianplc.com.

Job Description

The AI Dev Engineer develops and improving Agentic AI
solutions deployed across Experian's ecosystem. You will
ensure that AI agents (i.e. CrewAI), GenAI workflows, and
RPA/automation components operate reliably at scale, meeting
performance, quality, and compliance expectations.

Development and Testing

- Develop, test, and deploy AI/ML models and services for
  real‑world applications.
- Build data pipelines, integrate APIs, and implement MLOps
  practices for smooth production workflows.
- Collaborate with product, data, and engineering teams to
  provide end‑to‑end AI solutions.

Operational Support & Troubleshooting

- Monitor the performance, reliability, and behavior of
  Agentic AI solutions across production and non-production
  environments.
- Resolve incidents involving LLM outputs, agent flows, RPA
  steps, API integrations, or orchestration failures.
- Support incident response, root cause analysis, and
  documentation of corrective actions.
- Provide frontline technical support to business teams and
  internal users of AI-driven workflows.

Maintenance, Optimization, & Continuous Improvement

- Review logs, telemetry, and metrics to identify issues and
  performance bottlenecks.
- Recommend improvements to prompts, context structures,
  workflow orchestration, and automation logic.
- Maintain documentation on operational guides,
  troubleshooting guides, and system behavior expectations.

Deployment & Release Support

- Support deployments of new AI agents, MCP tool definitions,
  updates to prompts, and workflow changes.
- Participate in regression testing and environmental
  validation to ensure continuity across teams.
- Contribute to automated testing and runbooks for sustainable
  operations.

Collaboration & Partner Interaction

- Work with AI Engineers, RPA teams, Operational Excellence,
  Product Owners, and Security to ensure end-to-end solution
  stability.
- Participate in Agile ceremonies including standups, backlog
  grooming, sprint planning, and retrospectives to ensure
  operational needs and system reliability are represented.

MCP (Model Context Protocol) Support

- Understand and maintain basic MCP tool definitions used in
  agent workflows.
- Troubleshoot issues involving MCP-based interactions such as
  schema mismatches or context failures.
- You will report to a Senior Manager
- We require you to WFO 2 days a week, as they implement
  Hybrid working from Hyderabad.

Qualifications

- B E/ BTECH

- ME/MTECH/MCA
- We require you to have 3 to 6 or more years of experience in
  technical support, DevOps, automation support, software
  maintenance, or similar operational roles.
- You need to have familiarity with AI, LLM-based systems, or
  automation workflows (RPA, APIs, event-driven logic).
- Working knowledge of Python, PowerShell, or similar
  scripting languages for diagnostics and automation.
- Understanding of APIs, integrations, and common
  troubleshooting techniques.

Preferred Skills

- Experience supporting LLM/GenAI applications or automation
  platforms (CrewAI, UiPath, Automation Anywhere, Airflow,
  LangChain).
- Understanding of cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and
  monitoring tools.
- Familiarity with observability practices (metrics, tracing,
  logs, alerts).
- Experience operating within Agile delivery teams and
  applying Agile practices in support and maintenance
  workflows.

Additional Information

Our uniqueness is that we truly celebrate yours. Experian's
culture and people are important differentiators. We take
our people agenda very seriously and focus on what truly
matters; DEI, work/life balance, development, authenticity,
engagement, collaboration, wellness, reward & recognition,
volunteering... the list goes on. Experian's strong people
first approach is award winning; Great Place To Work™ in 24
countries, FORTUNE Best Companies to work and Glassdoor Best
Places to Work (globally 4.4 Stars) to name a few. Check out
Experian Life on social or our Careers Site to understand
why.

Experian is proud to be an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative
Action employer. Innovation is a critical part of Experian's
DNA and practices, and our diverse workforce drives our
success. Everyone can succeed at Experian and bring their
whole self to work, irrespective of their gender, ethnicity,
religion, color, sexuality, physical ability or age. If you
have a disability or special need that requires
accommodation, please let us know at the earliest
opportunity.

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Benefits

Experian care for employee's work life balance, health,
safety and wellbeing. In support of this endeavor, we offer
best-in-class family well-being benefits, enhanced medical
benefits and paid time off.

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

Build data pipelines, integrate APIs, and implement MLOps practices for production workflows

Resolve incidents involving LLM outputs, agent flows, RPA steps, and orchestration failures
Review logs and telemetry to identify performance bottlenecks and recommend improvements to prompts and workflows
Support deployments of AI agents, MCP tool definitions, and workflow changes

use_cases: Agentic AI workflows for Experian's financial services ecosystem
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves developing, deploying, and maintaining
Agentic AI solutions including AI agents (CrewAI), GenAI
workflows, and LLM outputs. The engineer works directly with
LLM-based systems, manages MCP tool definitions, optimizes
prompts, and ensures AI agents operate reliably in
production.
